external_basis.claim: Corrective/preventive action items should reduce recurrence rather than merely document failure.
external_basis.label: Google SRE postmortem culture

external_basis.claim: Retrospectives identify what worked, what failed, and concrete improvements for future work.
external_basis.label: Atlassian retrospective practice

mandatory_gates: Every accepted lesson must bind to at least one artifact evidence path.
Every accepted lesson must produce a regression fixture.
No lesson may be marked active from chat memory alone.
Stage exit must generate a phone-safe NEXT_STAGE_COPY_PROMPT.md.
Successful stages must export one short-name BOOTABLE_FULL_AUTHORITY bundle whenever possible.
purpose: Convert repeated chat/stage failures and successful corrections into durable OS lessons, promotion queue records, and regression fixtures.
